title: Armor & More
description: this mod adds more progression to minecraft while making it not to much harder and this mods also adds more armor type as of now ther is one new armor type just normal white wool  armor making this was a fun process and hope to add more to this mod
body: This mods adds a litte bit more pregression to minecraft to make minecraft a little bit more fun but not making progression to hard atleast in my opinion this mod also adds more armor but as of right now the lastest version 1.0.0 has only one new armor set but it will change in future there will be more this mod also adds more foods i sincely apoligize for any bugs you may find along the way.
